positive_profiles.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_downstream_consumer_default CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo run --manifest-path tests/fixtures/downstream-consumer-proof/Cargo.toml --bin default_consumer
positive_profiles.expected_signal: default_consumer exits 0 after exercising only root public re-exports

positive_profiles.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_downstream_consumer_metrics CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo run --manifest-path tests/fixtures/downstream-consumer-proof/Cargo.toml --features metrics-profile --bin metrics_consumer
positive_profiles.expected_signal: metrics_consumer exits 0 with the fixture's metrics-profile forwarding asupersync/metrics

positive_profiles.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_downstream_consumer_channel CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo run --manifest-path tests/fixtures/downstream-consumer-proof/Cargo.toml --features channel-mpsc-select-e2e-profile --bin channel_profile_consumer
positive_profiles.expected_signal: channel_profile_consumer exits 0 after resolving the feature-gated public channel runner without cfg(test)

dependency_profiles.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_downstream_consumer_tokio_tree cargo tree -e normal --manifest-path tests/fixtures/downstream-consumer-proof/Cargo.toml -i tokio

negative_fixtures.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_downstream_consumer_internal_negative CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' sh -c 'cargo check --manifest-path tests/fixtures/downstream-consumer-proof/Cargo.toml --bin internal_only_negative 2> /tmp/asupersync_downstream_consumer_negative.err && exit 1; grep -q "could not find .*test_utils.* in .*asupersync" /tmp/asupersync_downstream_consumer_negative.err'
negative_fixtures.expected_signal: cargo check fails with E0433 because asupersync::test_utils is unavailable outside test-internals

contract_profile.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_downstream_consumer_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test downstream_consumer_proof_contract -- --nocapture
